results.rendered_html:
bhallaḥ -llī -llaṃ [bhall-ac] A kind of crescent-shaped missile or arrow; kvacidākarṇavikṛṣṭabhallavarṣī  R. 9. 66 ; 4. 63 ; 7. 58. 
— llaḥ
1 A bear.
2 An epithet of Śiva.
3 The marking-nut-plant (bhallī also).
